chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1999 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For Katcha Peshi. 23.12.2016. Ms. Shahnila Rajput, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G alongwith ASI Ghulam Qadir Jalbani, P.S Mari Jalbani. -.-.-. ASI Ghulam Qadir Jalbani is present in person, however, informs that respondent No.3 Asghar Ali, the SHO P.S Mari Jalbani has been transferred to some other Police Station. This petition is disposed of with the directions that no harassment will be caused to the petitioner by private respondents No.4 to 10 namely; Wali Muhammad alias Wado Khan, Habib Khan, Haji Dur Khan, Sadiq Khan, Abdul Nabi, Rasool Bux and Zaman Khan, and in this regard police officials will discharge their duties strictly in accordance with law, inter alia, by providing protection to the petitioner if he approaches police officials with such a request. Today, ASI Ghulam Qadir Jalbani present in Court is further directed to serve the copy of this order upon private respondents No. 4 to 10 and submit a confirmation report in this regard before the learned Additional Registrar of this Court within ten days from today. JUDGE Ali Haider
